nasb.text: Now therefore, apportion this land for an inheritance to the nine tribes and the half-tribe of Manasseh.”

esv.text: Now therefore divide this land for an inheritance to the nine tribes and half the tribe of Manasseh.”

cnv.text: 現在你要把這地分給九個支派和瑪拿西半個支派作產業。”

ccb.text: 分给其他九个支派和玛拿西半个支派作产业。”
